description: The ViewReferenceController component is a view controller type component mainly used in desktop mode.

fields.PositionStream: The source for position values for this component.
fields.RotationStream: The source for rotation values for this component.
fields.ShouldVoiceBeActive: The field to drive with whether the user's voice should be transmitting.
fields._objectSlotScale: The field to drive with the object scale value.
fields._objectSlotActive: The field to drive with whether the object slot should be active.
